name: Sony (FCB series)
notes: FCB-EV7520 (30x), FCB-ER9500 (30x 4K), FCB-EW9500H (30x 4K HDMI), FCB-ER8530 (20x 4K). Industry standard.

name: KT&C
notes: ATC-HZ series: 10x, 22x, 30x, 40x. Global shutter 4K MIPI and HDMI.

name: Videology
notes: SCAiLX Edge AI zoom block cameras. 10x-55x. US manufacturer.

name: Active Silicon
notes: Harrier cameras — interface boards for Sony FCB and Tamron. 3G-SDI, USB3, Ethernet IP.

name: Linovision (Hinovision)
notes: Zoom camera modules 4x-90x. Network block cameras.

name: YXF Camera
notes: OEM camera modules. 20x optical zoom. USB/HDMI. Shenzhen.

name: Huanyu (Univision)
notes: UAV zoom modules. 4MP 10x, 2MP 26x. OIS drone camera modules.

name: VA Imaging
notes: 2MP 10x autofocus zoom MIPI camera for Raspberry Pi.

name: iShot / InterTest
notes: XBlock XBC-KZ36G (36x), XBC-KZ10 (10x). Also distributes Sony FCB, KT&C.

name: Dahua
notes: Makes zoom camera modules/cores for OEM.

name: Hikvision
notes: Makes zoom camera modules/cores for OEM.

name: Sinoseen
notes: OEM USB camera module with optical zoom.

name: Z3 Technology
notes: IP video encoder solutions/boards for block cameras.
